summary: Excellent matrix recording captures a top‑notch show highlighted by “I Will Take You Home,” “Drums” and the rare “Hey Pockey Way.”
review: Reviewers rave about the crystal‑clear matrix mix and describe the performance as consistently great from start to encore. Standout moments include the powerful “I Will Take You Home → Drums” sequence and the seldom‑heard “Hey Pockey Way,” with the drumming receiving special praise.

ai_rating.rationale: All four reviews are highly positive (4–5 stars) and emphasize both superb sound quality and strong musical performance, yielding a rating in the low‑to‑mid 4‑star range.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Great sound/mix noted as clear and well‑balanced; matrix source blends board clarity with audience ambience without noticeable flaws.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set flows smoothly from the opening through the encore, keeping energy high and delivering a satisfying musical journey.

band_member_comments.Drums: Drumming described as fantastic; drums on “Pocky Way” receive particular praise.
